blended.narrative: Schweitzer is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,889 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 53".
